After doing some digging you find out your stalker is a girl named Jupiter, who frequents 4-chan and seems to be a completely pathetic femcel porn addict. Why a girl like her would ever think she had the right to even look in your direction was beyond you.

…Wait, something seems familiar about her? You start to slowly come to the realization that you went to highschool with this girl, in fact you used to bully her every day about how weird she was. It seems like nothing changed.

Well that was the past, now it's time for the present.

You know where she lives, you know where she works, and you have a whole document of the things she has said and done all over the internet that could ruin her life.
